footer.tagline: Curated furniture for modern living. Crafted with intention, shipped worldwide.

hero.title: Design that lives with you
hero.subtitle: Ten curated pieces. Timeless forms, sustainable materials, delivered to your door.

philosophy.body: We believe in fewer, better things. Each piece in our collection is selected for craftsmanship, longevity, and the quiet confidence it brings to your space.

narrative.title: From workshop to your home
narrative.body: Partner ateliers across Europe and Asia. Carbon-conscious shipping. White-glove delivery available in select regions.

cta.title: Begin your space
cta.body: Ten pieces. Infinite combinations. Start with what speaks to you.

about.title: Furniture with intention
about.storyP1: Atelier was founded on a simple belief: your home deserves fewer, better things. We partner with independent workshops across Europe and Asia to bring you ten carefully curated pieces — each selected for craftsmanship, sustainability, and timeless design.
about.storyP2: We ship worldwide with carbon-conscious logistics. Every order is packed with care, and white-glove delivery is available in select regions.
